evidence.details: Examples: contracts/interfaces/IRiskAdapter.sol, contracts/interfaces/IMigratableLendingCore.sol, contracts/LendingEngine.sol imports those interfaces, contracts/DebtPool.sol still exposes lendingCore/setLendingCore/OnlyLendingCore, contracts/MarketVersionRegistry.sol and contracts/interfaces/IMarketVersionRegistry.sol still use lendingCore fields/params, scripts/snapshot-recent-events.mjs and scripts/liquidation-watch.mjs still reference manifest.contracts.lendingCore, and comments still mention LendingCore/LendingCoreV2.
